visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white dress and a beige cardigan, stands in a brightly lit warehouse retail store aisle. She holds a large, grey, U-shaped memory foam lap desk, gesturing towards the camera with a cheerful expression. Behind her, rows of boxed products are stacked on wooden pallets, creating an industrial shopping environment typical of a large warehouse club. (2) A close-up shot focuses on a price tag prominently displaying '$1,059'. The camera then cuts back to the woman as she begins demonstrating the product's use as a supportive chair backrest. A second woman, wearing a bucket hat, appears behind her, adding to the playful and collaborative atmosphere of the video through synchronized movements and shared laughter. (3) The main character sits on the floor, placing the lap desk over her lap. She mimics the action of typing on a laptop and using a smartphone, showing the product's ergonomic benefits. The environment remains busy with warehouse shelving and various home textile products visible in the background, reinforcing the commercial setting of the shoot. (4) The two women together showcase the pillow's side pockets, pointing out their utility for storing items like remotes or phones. They flip the pillow to show its flat side, jokingly calling it a 'dining table'. The video ends with a shot of nearly empty pallets, emphasizing the high sales volume of the item to create a sense of urgency.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 銷量超好. [Slogan]: 記憶棉兩用靠枕膝上桌. (2) [Subtitle]: 1059元. (3) [Subtitle]: 有點貴 可是感覺很挺. (4) [Subtitle]: 這是你的椅子. (5) [Subtitle]: 你如果坐在沙發上 你就可以這樣滑手機 看書 就是做各種事. (6) [Subtitle]: 你就不用 手肘很酸抬起來了. (7) [Subtitle]: 還是這樣子 就是我為你服務. (8) [Subtitle]: 你也可以抬起來. (9) [Subtitle]: 可以啊 就看家裡有沒有人. (10) [Subtitle]: 如果沒有的話 你就可以花1,000塊買這個. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後它還可以換 倒過來. [Variety]: 變餐桌. (12) [Subtitle]: 不是 什麼餐桌 人家是拿來工作的 你餐桌. (13) [Subtitle]: 你就可以讓這邊有沒有 放你的腳 然後就可以把你的筆電放上去 辦公. (14) [Subtitle]: 不好意思..辦公. [Variety]: 看起來很專業. (15) [Subtitle]: 好累哦 這裡沒有椅子可以試坐 可是你看. (16) [Subtitle]: 旁邊還可以放你的筆電啊 遙控器 這些 兩邊還有口袋. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以你把它當那個筆電桌的時候 你就可以把一些遙控器 冷氣遙控器 那些放這. (18) [Subtitle]: 這真的很挺的 你在 躺在床上吃早餐也可以. [Variety]: 下床去吃!. (19) [Subtitle]: 嗯~難怪那麼多人買 大家都不想離開床了吧. [Variety]: 下床去吃!. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後你寂寞的時候 還有人會抱著你. (21) [Subtitle]: 不是 你買兩個的話 就可以跟你那個同居人 這樣. (22) [Subtitle]: 有沒有 他惹你的話就可以這樣 咚! 咚!. (23) [Subtitle]: 反正我覺得不錯 難怪賣那麼好 你看 賣掉半箱了. (24) [Subtitle]: 不好 剩沒多少個哎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair wearing a white dress and beige cardigan; another woman wearing a beige bucket hat and matching dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior featuring high industrial ceilings, merchandise on pallets, and stacks of product boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched digital 'ding' sound effect triggers the start of the audio. An energetic female voice with a bright, friendly tone begins narrating over an upbeat, mid-tempo synth-based BGM. The voice has a high arousal level and clear articulation, characteristic of a professional social media vlog. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect occurs as text overlays appear on the screen. A second female voice joins in, creating a lively duo dynamic. Both voices exhibit high pitch variability and a joyful emotional valence while discussing the product's price. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) A subtle rustling sound of fabric is heard as the women manipulate the memory foam pillow. The speakers engage in fast-paced conversational speech, highlighting the ergonomic benefits of the item. The indoor room tone of the warehouse is very faint, providing a clean signal-to-noise ratio throughout the segment. (4) A series of rapid digital sound effects punctuate the demonstration of the side pockets and the pillow's versatility. The speakers' voices reach a peak arousal level as they joke about the product's extreme popularity. The upbeat electronic music continues to drive the energetic pace until the final hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Social Proof -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To enthusiastically recommend a 'Lap Desk' product found at Costco by demonstrating its multiple uses and highlighting its high demand in a relatable, high-energy vlog format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of a specific product with price information and brand visibility within a retail store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced shopping vlog using humor and multi-person interaction to drive interest in a specific Costco item.
